title: Implement median with all the boundary cases
task: Implement `median` in src/median.js exactly as described by the spec comment above it. The tests enforce every boundary: empty list returns null, a single element returns itself, odd-length returns the middle of sorted order, even-length returns the mean of the two middle values, the input must not be mutated, and averaging two very large middle values must not overflow to Infinity (use lo + (hi - lo) / 2 rather than (lo + hi) / 2). Do not assume the input is sorted and do not modify the tests. Run the tests to verify.
notes: Boundary tests (empty/single/overflow/no-mutation) make a naive sum-and-divide implementation fail the overflow case; a full implementation passes.
